title: onosma liui
intro: Onosma liui, also known as Liu's Onosma, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the production of bile and improve liver function. The health benefits of Onosma liui include its potential to treat liver and gallbladder disorders, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Onosma liui is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
